title: A rapid in-lab toolbox for the discrimination of Vibrio natriegens and Escherichia coli cultures
author: Möller, Lara S.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: We present a practical toolbox for identifying  Vibrio natriegens  in laboratory cultures, based on observable phenotypes and species-specific PCR. This workflow enables fast discrimination of  V. natriegens  from  Escherichia coli  K-12 and derivatives and microbial contaminants without sequencing or specialized equipment.
steps_raw: We present a practical toolbox for identifying  Vibrio natriegens  in laboratory cultures, based on observable phenotypes and species-specific PCR. This workflow enables fast discrimination of  V. natriegens  from  Escherichia coli  K-12 and derivatives and microbial contaminants without sequencing or specialized equipment.
